enum_values.name: Off
enum_values.description: Clock security system disabled (clock detector OFF)

enum_values.name: On
enum_values.description: Clock security system enable (clock detector ON if the HSE is ready, OFF if not)

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: HSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock

fields.name: PLLM
fields.description: Division factor for the main PLL (PLL) and audio PLL (PLLI2S) input clock

fields.name: PLLN
fields.description: Main PLL (PLL) multiplication factor for VCO

fields.name: PLLP
fields.description: Main PLL (PLL) division factor for main system clock

fields.name: PLLSRC
fields.description: Main PLL(PLL) and audio PLL (PLLI2S) entry clock source

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI clock selected as PLL and PLLI2S clock entry

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator clock selected as PLL and PLLI2S clock entry

fields.name: PLLQ
fields.description: Main PLL (PLL) division factor for USB OTG FS, SDIO and random number generator clocks

fields.name: PLLR
fields.description: PLL division factor for I2S and System clocks

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI oscillator used as system clock

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator used as system clock

fields.name: RTCPRE
fields.description: HSE division factor for RTC clock

enum_values.name: NotInterrupted
enum_values.description: No clock security interrupt caused by HSE clock failure

enum_values.name: Interrupted
enum_values.description: Clock security interrupt caused by HSE clock failure

fields.name: ADCRST
fields.description: ADC interface reset (common to all ADCs)

fields.name: EXTITEN
fields.description: EXTI ans external IT clock enable

enum_values.name: LSE
enum_values.description: LSE oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: LSI
enum_values.description: LSI oscillator clock used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: HSE
enum_values.description: HSE oscillator clock divided by a prescaler used as RTC clock

enum_values.name: Bypassed
enum_values.description: LSE crystal oscillator bypassed with external clock

enum_values.name: Low
enum_values.description: LSE oscillator low power mode selection

enum_values.name: High
enum_values.description: LSE oscillator high drive mode selection

enum_values.name: Mul1Or2
enum_values.description: If the APB prescaler is configured 1, TIMxCLK = PCLKx. Otherwise, TIMxCLK = 2xPCLKx

enum_values.name: Mul1Or4
enum_values.description: If the APB prescaler is configured 1, 2 or 4, TIMxCLK = HCLK. Otherwise, TIMxCLK = 4xPCLKx

enum_values.name: I2S_CKIN
enum_values.description: I2Sx clock frequency = I2S_CKIN Alternate function input frequency

enum_values.name: HSI_HSE
enum_values.description: I2Sx clock frequency = HSI/HSE depends on PLLSRC bit (PLLCFGR[22])

enum_values.name: APB
enum_values.description: APB clock selected as I2C clock

enum_values.name: SYSCLK
enum_values.description: System clock selected as I2C clock

enum_values.name: HSI
enum_values.description: HSI clock selected as I2C clock

enum_values.description: APB1 clock (PCLK1) selected as LPTILM1 clock

enum_values.description: LSI clock is selected as LPTILM1 clock

enum_values.description: HSI clock is selected as LPTILM1 clock
